privileged_info_summary: The basketball_play_diagram task requires an agent to create a 3-page ActivInspire flipchart titled 'basketball_playbook.flipchart' saved to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/. ActivInspire is Promethean's educational whiteboard software (version 2004, build 3.5.18). Flipchart files are ZIP archives containing XML. The task involves creating: (1) a court layout page with 'Half Court Setup' title and geometric shapes (rectangle, circle), (2) a roster page titled 'Offensive Starters' with 5 basketball positions (PG, SG, SF, PF, C), and (3) a play diagram page titled 'Pick and Roll' with offense/defense labels and a screen setup. Note: The task description mentions text labels 'O1' and 'X1' on page 3, but the metadata's required_text field does not include these items, only listing 4 required text strings instead of 6. The data is synthetic - created during task execution, not from external sources.
